items.title: Machine learning in Pytorch
items.description: A 5-day introductory machine learning course for life science researchers, including PyTorch foundations and a histopathology image classification challenge.

items.title: Introduction to Python
items.description: A 2-day Python crash course where I helped restructure content and taught basic syntax, functions, and programming fundamentals.

items.title: From Excel to R
items.description: A 2-day introduction to R where I contributed tidyverse teaching materials and supported the course as TA.
